meaning: n.仿男式女衬衫,衬衣式边衣裙
examples: The doors in the Triangle Shirtwaist Factory only opened inward.
At the Triangle Shirtwaist Factory, some of the doors were locked.
The Triangle Shirtwaist Fire remains as a turning point in US history.
And this March 25th is the 100th anniversary of the horrific 1911 New York City Triangle Shirtwaist Factory fire (one of the all time worst U.S. industrial accidents, which took 146 lives).
Fitted shirtwaist styles aren't too overwhelming.
